how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Type 'river identity' in Ethica to confirm arrival. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes.
session_028_completed: Priority 1 — Gage status writer complete. _gage_status(state, task, action, progress) helper added to gage_bridge.py at line 34. ACTIVE written at entry of gage_chat, gage_read_code, gage_vision. IDLE written at success, error, and timeout exits. Mirrors _river_status pattern exactly.

Priority 2 — inject_acknowledged_reader complete. _river_inject_poll() added to river.py — daemon thread, 5s poll, reads river_status.json for injected_task + inject_acknowledged:false, acknowledges immediately, routes to river_plan(), writes inject_result + inject_result_time back to status JSON. Same pattern in _gage_inject_poll() in gage_bridge.py — routes to gage_vision() for image paths, gage_chat() for text. Both threads start at module load.

Priority 3 — AnomalyDetection module installed. sklearn 1.8.0 installed in gage_env (not Ethica_env — kept isolated). Module at ~/Ethica/modules/anomaly_detection/ with anomaly_bridge.py, _anomaly_worker.py, manifest.json, __init__.py. Worker runs in gage_env subprocess. Three tools: anomaly_status, anomaly_train, anomaly_scan. All routing to Ops correctly. Model persisted to ~/Ethica/status/anomaly_model.pkl.

Lesson documented — guard seal confirm sequence. Correct order: patch → ast.parse verify → test in Ethica → guard seal confirm. guard seal confirm snapshots current state into vault manifest in one shot. Never leave a session without guard seal confirm as final step.
Vault sealed — 80 files protected after session close.

gage_status_writer.helper: _gage_status(state, task, action, progress=0) in gage_bridge.py line 34

inject_acknowledged_reader.gage_handler: gage_vision(task) for image extensions, gage_chat(task) for text
inject_acknowledged_reader.acknowledge_first: inject_acknowledged:true written BEFORE handler runs — prevents double-consume on restart
inject_acknowledged_reader.result_field: inject_result + inject_result_time written back to agent status JSON

anomaly_detection_module.note: Isolation Forest contamination=0.1. Training data quality determines detection accuracy — small datasets may flag edge values unexpectedly.

architecture_notes.vault_seal_protocol: patch → ast.parse verify → test in Ethica → guard seal confirm. guard seal confirm snapshots all current files into vault in one operation. Running guard heal before guard seal confirm will restore pre-patch vault state and wipe changes.

known_issues.anomaly_scan_inversion: Small training datasets cause edge values to be flagged instead of true outliers. Isolation Forest needs representative baseline data. Usage concern, not a code bug.
